name: Programmatic Advertising
description: Plans and executes automated media buying across programmatic platforms including DV360, Trade Desk, and Xandr to reach target audiences efficiently through real-time bidding.

variables.name: campaign_goal
variables.description: Campaign objective: awareness, consideration, or conversion

variables.name: audience_segments
variables.description: Target audience segments: first-party data, third-party segments, lookalike models

variables.name: inventory_type
variables.description: Inventory source: PMP, open exchange, programmatic guaranteed

variables.name: dsp_platform
variables.description: Platform: DV360, Trade Desk, Xandr, or other DSP
